min_entry_age.source_quote: The minimum entry age is 91 days. Children between 91 days and 5 years can be insured provided either parent is getting insured under this Policy.

max_entry_age.source_quote: Maximum Age: The maximum entry age is 65 years. There is no maximum cover ceasing age in this Policy.

min_child_entry_age.source_quote: Minimum Age: The minimum entry age is 91 days. Children between 91 days and 5 years can be insured provided either parent is getting insured under this Policy.
